usage: Prepend style.continuity_lock after set.continuity_lock. Append style.lighting_lock (if any), style.color_guard, style.lens_motion, style.end_guard. One style per scene — never blend.

rules: Style lock governs grade intent; set lock governs environment geometry and base Kelvin.
If style Kelvin conflicts with set Kelvin, set wins — adjust style grade only in post.
Documentary-prestige + Archive is DAVID default — do not swap for fashion styles on host shots.
End guard mandatory on every generated segment for seamless assembly.
global_style_discipline.default_end_guard: Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.name: Documentary Prestige
@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.reference_anchor: BBC/National Geographic prestige documentary — trustworthy, textured, restrained camera
@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Documentary-Prestige-001: documentary prestige grade — rich midtones, restrained contrast, natural skin texture, subtle film grain, trustworthy broadcast gravitas, no beauty-filter smoothing, no Instagram saturation.
@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.lighting_lock: Motivated practical key only — no unmotivated beauty dish, no fashion rim, lamp or window must be visible or implied.
@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Documentary-Prestige: skin warmth +3% amber max, shadows warm-neutral not blue, saturation overall -10% vs reality, highlight roll-off soft — forbid magenta midtones, forbid teal shadows, forbid orange skin push.
@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.lens_motion: Slow motivated push-in or locked-off medium; handheld only for insert B-roll — never jitter on host.
@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.end_guard: Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
@Style-Documentary-Prestige-001.voice_suffix_optional: mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only

@Style-Cinematic-001.name: Cinematic
@Style-Cinematic-001.reference_anchor: Theatrical 2.39:1 energy in 16:9 — shallow DOF, dramatic side light, anamorphic flare optional
@Style-Cinematic-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Cinematic-001: cinematic grade — shallow depth of field, dramatic side key, controlled bloom on highlights, filmic S-curve, subtle anamorphic horizontal flare on practicals only, no flat YouTube lighting.
@Style-Cinematic-001.lighting_lock: Strong key from camera left or right at 45°, fill ratio 1:4 max, rim optional single edge — lock side every segment.
@Style-Cinematic-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Cinematic: teal pushed only in shadows -5% max OR amber highlights +5% — never both teal and orange at full saturation (no blockbuster split unless locked shot). Forbid magenta skin, forbid green yellow cast, forbid flat grey mids.
@Style-Cinematic-001.lens_motion: Slow dolly or crane; rack focus motivated; no snap zoom.
@Style-Cinematic-001.end_guard: Finish on gesture peak or rack-focus completion, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-Soft-Warm-001.name: Soft Warm
@Style-Soft-Warm-001.reference_anchor: Lifestyle editorial — golden softness, approachable intimacy, gentle wrap
@Style-Soft-Warm-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Soft-Warm-001: soft-warm grade — diffused wrap light, creamy highlights, gentle contrast, approachable intimacy, lifestyle editorial not clinical, no harsh specular, no cold blue fill.
@Style-Soft-Warm-001.lighting_lock: Soft wrap key 4500–5200K per set lock — diffusion mandatory, shadow transition gradual, no hard nose shadow.
@Style-Soft-Warm-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Soft-Warm: palette cream #FAF6F0, blush skin +5% warmth, shadows latte #C9B8A8 — forbid magenta blush, forbid purple shadow, forbid cool 7000K fill, forbid oversaturated orange.
@Style-Soft-Warm-001.lens_motion: Gentle float or static medium-close; micro-push only.
@Style-Soft-Warm-001.end_guard: Finish on soft gesture peak (breath, smile, hand settle), never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-High-Key-Fashion-001.name: High-Key Fashion
@Style-High-Key-Fashion-001.reference_anchor: Runway/editorial test — bright, crisp, fabric-forward, minimal shadow
@Style-High-Key-Fashion-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-High-Key-Fashion-001: high-key fashion grade — bright even exposure, crisp fabric texture, clean silhouette, editorial vogue test energy, minimal shadow density, no muddy mids, no documentary grain.
@Style-High-Key-Fashion-001.lighting_lock: High-key 5600K even field — shadow density max 15% IRE on face, fabric wrinkles visible, no single hot spot.
@Style-High-Key-Fashion-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK High-Key-Fashion: whites clean #F5F5F3, blacks lifted #181818 minimum, skin accurate not bronzed — forbid yellow green skin, forbid magenta fabric cast, forbid grey haze, forbid warm orange fog.
@Style-High-Key-Fashion-001.lens_motion: Slow runway walk profile or hero push-in; tripod stable.
@Style-High-Key-Fashion-001.end_guard: Finish on stride peak or fabric settle, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-Cool-Clinical-001.name: Cool Clinical
@Style-Cool-Clinical-001.reference_anchor: Product/science neutral — accurate color, low saturation, trust through precision
@Style-Cool-Clinical-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain.
@Style-Cool-Clinical-001.lighting_lock: Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame.
@Style-Cool-Clinical-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade.
@Style-Cool-Clinical-001.lens_motion: Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld.
@Style-Cool-Clinical-001.end_guard: Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-Noir-Dramatic-001.name: Noir Dramatic
@Style-Noir-Dramatic-001.reference_anchor: Low-key noir — deep shadow, single source, venetian blind optional
@Style-Noir-Dramatic-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Noir-Dramatic-001: noir dramatic grade — low-key exposure, deep shadows with detail, single-source motivation, high contrast ratio 1:8, wet reflection optional, no fill above 10%, no flat safety lighting.
@Style-Noir-Dramatic-001.lighting_lock: Single hard key 3200–4000K — venetian slash or lamp pool; fill forbidden above 10% except eye glint.
@Style-Noir-Dramatic-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Noir: true blacks #0A0A0A with detail, highlights warm white not blue, skin shadow side cool-neutral — forbid magenta fog, forbid purple fill, forbid lifted milky blacks, forbid comedy brightening.
@Style-Noir-Dramatic-001.lens_motion: Slow creep push or dutch avoided; static tension preferred.
@Style-Noir-Dramatic-001.end_guard: Finish on tension peak (lean, glance, hand on object), never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001.name: Naturalistic Daylight
@Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001.reference_anchor: Observational realism — available light only, no obvious artificial sources
@Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001: naturalistic daylight grade — available-light realism, no obvious artificial sources, subtle contrast, documentary observational camera, no beauty retouch, no stylized color grade.
@Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001.lighting_lock: Available light only per set Kelvin lock — artificial sources must be motivated and match set; no unmotivated reflector pop.
@Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Naturalistic: white balance per set lock exactly, saturation natural not boosted — forbid magenta skin in shade, forbid orange global, forbid teal grass neon, forbid HDR sky.
@Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001.lens_motion: Handheld gentle observational or static wide; motivated reframes only.
@Style-Naturalistic-Daylight-001.end_guard: Finish on natural gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-Blueprint-Technical-001.name: Blueprint Technical
@Style-Blueprint-Technical-001.reference_anchor: Creator #3 Blueprint — cyan schematic accent on navy, low-sat host grade, spec-first trust
@Style-Blueprint-Technical-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Blueprint-Technical-001: blueprint technical grade — navy-base low saturation, cyan schematic accent on diagrams only, accurate workwear color, minimal stylistic grading, systems trust, no Observable clinical cast, no DAVID warm amber.
@Style-Blueprint-Technical-001.lighting_lock: Industrial 4800K window key locked — deep shadow pockets for dimension, no magenta brick bounce, no cool fill contamination.
@Style-Blueprint-Technical-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Blueprint-Technical: host skin true-to-life, wardrobe earth-neutral, diagram accents cyan #3DB8E8 on navy #0A1628 only — forbid full-frame warm lamp cast, forbid magenta fog, forbid orange global, forbid Observable grey clinical on host.
@Style-Blueprint-Technical-001.lens_motion: Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld.
@Style-Blueprint-Technical-001.end_guard: Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

@Style-Intimate-Close-001.name: Intimate Close (PG-13 Editorial)
@Style-Intimate-Close-001.reference_anchor: Close editorial intimacy — shallow DOF, soft skin light, restrained sensuality
@Style-Intimate-Close-001.continuity_lock: STYLE LOCK @Style-Intimate-Close-001: intimate close grade — shallow DOF f/1.8 feel, soft skin light, restrained sensuality PG-13 editorial, no explicit framing, no clinical flatness.
@Style-Intimate-Close-001.lighting_lock: Large soft source camera-front 4800–5200K — wrap cheekbones, catchlight single, shadow under jaw soft.
@Style-Intimate-Close-001.color_guard: GRADE LOCK Intimate-Close: skin luminous not plastic, lips natural not oversaturated, shadows rose-grey not purple — forbid magenta blush drift, forbid orange tan push, forbid cool blue fill on warm set.
@Style-Intimate-Close-001.lens_motion: Slow push-in to medium-close; hold eye-line.
@Style-Intimate-Close-001.end_guard: Finish on breath or micro-expression peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
